  • Module

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Agent
Represents an agent moving through the graph.
AStarPathFinder
Implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm.
DijkstraPathFinder
Implementation of the PathFinder interface using Dijkstra's algorithm.
Edge
Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph.
FastAgent
A faster variant of the standard Agent.
Graph
Represents a graph using an adjacency list structure.
GraphController
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph.
GraphView
 
Main
 
MainApp
 
Node
Represents a node in the graph.
PathFinder
Defines a pathfinding strategy capable of computing a path between two nodes.
PathFinderFactory
Factory used to create PathFinder implementations.
PathFinderType
Types of pathfinding algorithms available in the simulation.
SimulationController
Controller responsible for building and configuring the simulation engine.
SimulationEngine
Manages the execution of the simulation.
State
Represents the possible states of an agent.
ToolBox
Simple toolbar for graph editing and simulation controls.
